Items.Title: Capture accepted baseline for the fixed suite
Items.Hypothesis: A fresh benchmark summary gives the comparison point for all later commits.

Items.Title: Profile full-history rebuild overhead
Items.Hypothesis: Rebuilding all placements and segments on every frame is the dominant bidirectional cost.

Items.Title: Cache reusable per-frame pixel snapshots
Items.Hypothesis: Avoiding repeated bitmap-to-buffer extraction will reduce replay and stitch time.
